properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You were all alone You were constantly broken You felt so unloved You were left abandoned What a difference love can make To the deep heartbreak back then

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This is now This is hope This is the end of a longing The beginning of a road To a change Where everything around you no longer falling down This is now This is now

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're allowed to dream You can think of tomorrow And you can say goodbye To all of your sorrow That's the difference love can make To the hurt you've held within

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: This is now This is hope This is the end of a longing The beginning of a road To a change Where everything around you no longer falling down This is now

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: This is Jesus What you've been waiting for So open up Hear the words Your life is lost no more

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: This is now This is hope Beginning of a road Where every chain around you no longer has you bound

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: This is now This is hope This is the end of a longing The beginning of a road To a change Where everything around you no longer falling down This is now This is now This is hope This is Jesus This is now
